pages.core_message: Q1 2026 — 34% SMB market share. Three releases. One quarter. Zero downtime.

items: 34% market share in the SMB segment

pages.speaker_notes: Opening page — set the tone. Frame Q1 as a turning point from execution to market leadership.
pages.source_excerpt:
## Page 1: Market Position

The company has shipped 3 major releases in Q1 and now holds 34% market share in the SMB segment.

H1: From Shipping to Leading
H2: Q1 2026 — 34% SMB market share
Body: Three releases. One quarter. Zero downtime.

pages.action_title: Three numbers that define the quarter
pages.core_message: Revenue $12.4M (+22% QoQ), Active accounts 8,400 (+18% QoQ), NPS 72 (+5 points).
pages.speaker_notes: Data-heavy page. Emphasize the QoQ growth numbers — 22% revenue growth is the headline. NPS improvement shows product quality is the growth engine.
pages.source_excerpt:
## Page 2: Key Metrics

Three numbers that define the quarter.

- Revenue: $12.4M (+22% QoQ)
- Active accounts: 8,400 (+18% QoQ)
- NPS: 72 (+5 points)

pages.action_title: The biggest lever was onboarding automation
pages.core_message: Before: manual onboarding, 3-day time-to-value, 40% activation. After: automated onboarding, 4-hour time-to-value, 78% activation.

items: Before Q1: manual onboarding, 3-day time-to-value, 40% activation rate
After Q1: automated onboarding, 4-hour time-to-value, 78% activation rate

pages.speaker_notes: This is the 'how' page. The before/after contrast should be stark. If the audience asks about the automation tooling, mention it was built in-house over 6 weeks.
pages.source_excerpt:
## Page 3: What Changed

Before Q1: manual onboarding, 3-day time-to-value, 40% activation rate.
After Q1: automated onboarding, 4-hour time-to-value, 78% activation rate.

H1: The biggest lever was onboarding automation
